description: Customer billing disputes — one row per dispute submitted for resolution. Holds the 14 inputs the Resolution Drafter Agent consumes plus an evalName tag for eval/memory-pressure-test rows. Field names are snake_case to match the agent's input schema directly, so an RPA wrapper can pass row fields straight through. evalName is NULL for production rows.

fields.description: Display name on the email greeting.
Enum (not server-enforced): platinum | gold | silver | standard. Tone signal.
Comma-separated account flags. Common values: repeat_disputer, high_value_account, or 'none'.
Sender company name on the email sign-off (e.g., 'PATH Industries').
Exact invoice ID; must appear verbatim in the email's subject and body.
The customer's own words from the dispute portal submission. High-weight memory retrieval key.
Enum (not server-enforced): pricing_mismatch | tax_type_error | tax_rate_error | duplicate_charge | missing_discount | quantity_mismatch | multiple. High-weight memory retrieval key.
One-line description of impacted line items (e.g., '2 line items, HR Coil HSN 7208').
Enum: credit_memo | revised_invoice | both. What the upstream subflow posted to the ERP.
Adjustment identifier(s), e.g., 'CM-2026-001234' or 'CM-...,REV-INV-...' when both.
Credit amount in INR. Zero for pure tax-type corrections.
Remaining balance on the original invoice post-adjustment, in INR.
Sign-off name on the resolution email.
Eval ID for eval-mode rows (B1-B10 baseline, M1-M10 memory-touching, M1-item0-M10-item0 memory pressure-tests). NULL for production rows.
